causal_chain: 2025-05-28T14:21:45Z: NullPointerException in PaymentProcessor.processCheckout raised in Sentry
2025-05-28T14:23:10Z: #incidents Slack thread: 'checkout failing for all users'
engineer_summary: Deploy v2.1.3 introduced a null reference in the payment processing pipeline when handling legacy card formats. The bug was caught 3 minutes post-deployment via Sentry alerts and is already being investigated by the on-call team.
draft_customer_response: We've identified a bug in our checkout system that was deployed 20 minutes ago. Our engineering team is rolling back the change now. Your transaction should complete shortly. We apologize for the inconvenience.
recommended_action: Roll back checkout-service to v2.1.2 immediately. Implement null-safety tests in CI/CD for payment-related code.
